languages.text: Суровые условия принуждают к суровым мерам. Постройка аугментического цеха усилит местных и значительно повысит шансы выживания.

traits.locale_text: Суровые условия принуждают к суровым мерам. Постройка аугментического цеха усилит местных и значительно повысит шансы выживания.

languages.text: Всякий день слуги Бога-Императора теряют конечности и органы в нескончаемой войне с ксенофлорой планеты. Милостью Вольного Торговца в селениях выстроят мануфакторумы священных аугментацией, где служители Омниссии сопрягут священное железо аугментов с плотью пострадавших солдат, тем самым даруя им шанс продолжить службу во имя династии.

traits.locale_text: Каждый день жители планеты теряют части тела в бесконечной войне с флорой и фауной. Строительство аугментического цеха вернет травмированных солдат в строй.

languages.text: Each day, the God-Emperor's servants suffer the loss of limbs and organs in unceasing conflict with the planet's xenoflora. By the grace of the Rogue Trader, manufactorums dedicated to sacred augmetics will be established in the settlements, where Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah shall fuse the sacred iron of the augments with the flesh of wounded soldiers, thereby granting them the chance to resume their service to the dynasty.
languages.original_text: Всякий день слуги Бога-Императора теряют конечности и органы в нескончаемой войне с ксенофлорой планеты. Милостью Вольного Торговца в селениях выстроят мануфакторумы священных аугментацией, где служители Омниссии сопрягут священное железо аугментов с плотью пострадавших солдат, тем самым даруя им шанс продолжить службу во имя династии.

traits.locale_text: Each passing day, the God-Emperor's servants suffer the loss of limbs and organs in an unceasing conflict with the planet's xenoflora. By the grace of the Rogue Trader, manufactorums dedicated to sacred augmetics will rise within the settlements, where the Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah shall fuse the sacred iron of the augments with the flesh of wounded soldiers, thereby granting them the chance to resume their service to the dynasty.

Each passing day, the God-Emperor's servants suffer the loss of limbs and organs in an unceasing conflict with the planet's xenoflora. By the grace of the Rogue Trader, manufactorums dedicated to sacred augmetics will rise within the settlements, where the Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah shall fuse the sacred iron of the augments with the flesh of wounded soldiers, thereby granting them the chance to resume their service to the dynasty.

Each day, the God-Emperor's servants suffer the loss of limbs and organs in unceasing conflict with the planet's xenoflora. By the grace of the Rogue Trader, manufactorums dedicated to sacred augmetics will be established in the settlements, where Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah shall fuse the sacred iron of the augments with the flesh of wounded soldiers, thereby granting them the chance to resume their service to the dynasty.

Each day, the God-Emperor's servants suffer the loss of limbs and organs in unceasing conflict with the planet's xenoflora. By the grace of the Rogue Trader, manufactorums dedicated to sacred augmetics will be established in the settlements, where Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah shall fuse the sacred iron of the augments with the flesh of wounded soldiers, thereby granting them the chance to resume their service to the dynasty.

languages.text: Cada día, los siervos del Dios Emperador pierden extremidades y órganos en su incesante conflicto con la xenoflora del planeta. Por la gracia de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, se establecerán manufactorums destinados a producir auméticos sagrados en los asentamientos, para que los tecnosacerdotes del Omnissiah combinen el sagrado metal de los aumentos con la carne de los soldados heridos, dándoles la oportunidad de retomar su servicio a la dinastía.
languages.original_text: Each day, the God-Emperor's servants suffer the loss of limbs and organs in unceasing conflict with the planet's xenoflora. By the grace of the Rogue Trader, manufactorums dedicated to sacred augmetics will be established in the settlements, where Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah shall fuse the sacred iron of the augments with the flesh of wounded soldiers, thereby granting them the chance to resume their service to the dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Cada día, los siervos del Dios Emperador pierden extremidades y órganos en su incesante conflicto con la xenoflora del planeta. Por la gracia de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, se establecerán manufactorums destinados a producir auméticos sagrados en los asentamientos, para que los tecnosacerdotes del Omnissiah combinen el sagrado metal de los aumentos con la carne de los soldados heridos, dándoles la oportunidad de retomar su servicio a la dinastía.

languages.text: 每一天，在与这颗行星异形植被无休止的对抗中，神皇的仆从们都遭受着失去肢体与器官的伤痛。蒙行商浪人的恩典，各定居点将兴建专门制造神圣植入物的工厂，欧姆尼赛亚的技术神甫们将在此把植入物的圣铁与受伤士兵的血肉融合，以此赐予他们重新为王朝效命的机会。
languages.original_text: Each day, the God-Emperor's servants suffer the loss of limbs and organs in unceasing conflict with the planet's xenoflora. By the grace of the Rogue Trader, manufactorums dedicated to sacred augmetics will be established in the settlements, where Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah shall fuse the sacred iron of the augments with the flesh of wounded soldiers, thereby granting them the chance to resume their service to the dynasty.

traits.locale_text: 每一天，在与这颗行星异形植被无休止的对抗中，神皇的仆从们都遭受着失去肢体与器官的伤痛。蒙行商浪人的恩典，各定居点将兴建专门制造神圣植入物的工厂，欧姆尼赛亚的技术神甫们将在此把植入物的圣铁与受伤士兵的血肉融合，以此赐予他们重新为王朝效命的机会。

languages.text: Chaque jour, les serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu perdent des membres ou des organes dans leur combat incessant contre la xénoflore de la planète. Grâce {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande}, des manufactorums dédiés à la fabrication d'augmétiques sacrés seront installés dans la colonie. Les technoprêtres de l'Omnimessie pourront y fusionner le métal sacré des augmentations avec la chair des soldats blessés, leur offrant ainsi une chance de continuer à servir la dynastie.
languages.original_text: Each day, the God-Emperor's servants suffer the loss of limbs and organs in unceasing conflict with the planet's xenoflora. By the grace of the Rogue Trader, manufactorums dedicated to sacred augmetics will be established in the settlements, where Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah shall fuse the sacred iron of the augments with the flesh of wounded soldiers, thereby granting them the chance to resume their service to the dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Chaque jour, les serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu perdent des membres ou des organes dans leur combat incessant contre la xénoflore de la planète. Grâce {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande}, des manufactorums dédiés à la fabrication d'augmétiques sacrés seront installés dans la colonie. Les technoprêtres de l'Omnimessie pourront y fusionner le métal sacré des augmentations avec la chair des soldats blessés, leur offrant ainsi une chance de continuer à servir la dynastie.

languages.text: Tanrı İmparator'un hizmetkârları, her gün gezegenin zeno florasıyla girdikleri bitmek bilmeyen çatışmalarda uzuv ve organlarını kaybediyor. Hür Tacir'in lütfuyla, yerleşim yerlerinde kutsal ogmetiklere adanmış manufaktorumlar kurulacak. Burada Hermesih'in Tekno Rahipleri, ogmentlerin kutsal demirini yaralı askerlerin etleriyle birleştirerek onlara hanedanlığa hizmet etmeyi sürdürme şansı verecek.
languages.original_text: Each day, the God-Emperor's servants suffer the loss of limbs and organs in unceasing conflict with the planet's xenoflora. By the grace of the Rogue Trader, manufactorums dedicated to sacred augmetics will be established in the settlements, where Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah shall fuse the sacred iron of the augments with the flesh of wounded soldiers, thereby granting them the chance to resume their service to the dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Tanrı İmparator'un hizmetkârları, her gün gezegenin zeno florasıyla girdikleri bitmek bilmeyen çatışmalarda uzuv ve organlarını kaybediyor. Hür Tacir'in lütfuyla, yerleşim yerlerinde kutsal ogmetiklere adanmış manufaktorumlar kurulacak. Burada Hermesih'in Tekno Rahipleri, ogmentlerin kutsal demirini yaralı askerlerin etleriyle birleştirerek onlara hanedanlığa hizmet etmeyi sürdürme şansı verecek.

languages.text: 神帝のしもべたちは、この惑星の異種植物と絶え間ない戦いで、日々、四肢や臓器を失っている。ならず者商人によって、この集落に聖なる増幅手術の工場が設立され、オムニシアの技術司祭が、増幅手術の聖なる鉄を傷ついた兵士の肉体に融合させることで、彼らに再び王朝に仕える機会を与えるだろう。
languages.original_text: Each day, the God-Emperor's servants suffer the loss of limbs and organs in unceasing conflict with the planet's xenoflora. By the grace of the Rogue Trader, manufactorums dedicated to sacred augmetics will be established in the settlements, where Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah shall fuse the sacred iron of the augments with the flesh of wounded soldiers, thereby granting them the chance to resume their service to the dynasty.

traits.locale_text: 神帝のしもべたちは、この惑星の異種植物と絶え間ない戦いで、日々、四肢や臓器を失っている。ならず者商人によって、この集落に聖なる増幅手術の工場が設立され、オムニシアの技術司祭が、増幅手術の聖なる鉄を傷ついた兵士の肉体に融合させることで、彼らに再び王朝に仕える機会を与えるだろう。

languages.text: Tag für Tag verlieren die Diener des Gottimperators im endlosen Konflikt mit der Xenoflora des Planeten Gliedmaßen und Organe. Durch die Gnade {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} werden in den Siedlungen Manufactorien für heilige Augmentationen eingerichtet, in denen Techpriester des Omnissiah das heilige Eisen der Augmentationen mit dem Fleisch verwundeter Soldaten verschmelzen, um ihnen die Chance zu geben, ihren Dienst für die Dynastie wieder aufzunehmen.
